description: Fix equip avatar bug: make avatarId nullable in NgepetOwnedAvatarItem since backend strips avatar_id via makeHidden, and use ownedItem.avatar?.id in the equip button click handler instead of ownedItem.avatarId.
steps: In GameModels.kt, change NgepetOwnedAvatarItem.avatarId from `val avatarId: Int` to `val avatarId: Int? = null`
acceptance_criteria: NgepetOwnedAvatarItem.avatarId is nullable with default null
Equip button uses ownedItem.avatar?.id instead of ownedItem.avatarId
verification: Run: export JAVA_HOME=/root/.local/share/mise/installs/java/17.0.2 && export PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH && cd /projects/sandbox/Mobile-Apps/MysticNusa && ./gradlew assembleDebug
findings: Both changes applied and build verified with assembleDebug. The avatarId field is now nullable with default null, and the equip button safely uses the nested avatar object's id via let.
